name: P:GTA.Math.Vector3.Item(System.Int32)
summary: Gets or sets the component at the specified index.
returns: The value of the component at the specified index.
value: The value of the X, Y or Z component, depending on the index.

params.name: index
params.description: The index of the component to access. Use 0 for the X component, 1 for the Y component and 2 for the Z component.
